programme.title: Megacorte de agua
programme.desc: La alcaldía anuncia un mega corte de agua y los vecinos acabarán con el suministro del edificio. Los López Pérez instalan un aire acondicionado en su departamento.

programme.title: Bloopers
programme.desc: Un capítulo especial con las equivocaciones de los vecinos más divertidas de la temporada. Descubre quién de los inquilinos comete más errores a la hora de grabar los episodios de la serie.

programme.title: Las palomas
programme.desc: A plague of pigeons arrives at the building and the neighbors fight them off with help from Germán. The López Pérez family runs out of coffee and Arturo must get it from the neighbors.

programme.title: Quédate en casa
programme.desc: The neighbors organize to fight the Coronavirus pandemic. The situation is complicated when someone steals the antibacterial gel from the entrance.

programme.title: El huerto de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa puts a garden in the building, but discovers that someone is stealing her vegetables. Rocko has an intense toothache and doesn't want to go to the dentist.

programme.title: El colchón viejo
programme.desc: Magdalena sells her old mattress to Jorjais, unaware that Arturo keeps his savings there. Cris asks Pedro to formalize their relationship.

programme.title: Los quince años
programme.desc: It is Germán's 15th anniversary working in the building and is celebrated with a party. Frankie Rivers has a creative crisis.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: There is a leak in one of the gas tanks and Germán is in charge of repairing it. Benito has a casting for the Rocky movie.

programme.title: Arturo sastre
programme.desc: Arturo takes out his old sewing machine to dedicate himself to sewing. Vanesa brings a rooster with Alzheimer's into the building that crows all day.

programme.title: El trabajo de Alejandra
programme.desc: The López Pérez need an extra income of money and Alejandra goes out to look for a job. Benito meets a friend from the castings and invites him to the apartment.

programme.title: La gotera
programme.desc: A leak in the López Pérez bathroom causes leaks in Pedro's apartment. Benito and Liz go to a casting for the musical Grease.

programme.title: Mi amiga Virginia
programme.desc: Virginia is left homeless and jobless. Germán decides to give her asylum and she becomes everyone's best friend. Luis signs up for Zumba classes online.

programme.title: Fiesta de casados
programme.desc: Luis feels lonely and Silvia encourages him to organize a meeting in the apartment. Luis invites the married men in the building. Vanesa entrusts Germán with a little bird with behavior problems.

programme.title: San Antonio
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis accidentally break Silvia's San Antonio statue. The López Pérez family complain about the high water consumption in the building.

programme.title: No se peleen
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis fight over Borre's last taco and they stop talking. Vanesa leaves Benito in charge of a cat.

programme.title: El álbum
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis find a photo album in the garbage and through it they remember the best of the worst of the neighbors.

programme.title: Germán por un día
programme.desc: Germán gets sick and the neighbors decide to help him with the building work. Magdalena invents a trip to Paris to show off to her friend.

programme.title: Embarazo
programme.desc: Germán has the task of planting small trees that the mayor's office has given them. Someone in the building is pregnant.

programme.title: ¡Voy a ser papá!
programme.desc: Silvia le confiesa a Luis que está embarazada y él comienza a comprar muchas cosas para el bebé. Magdalena y su familia se vuelven ricos y comienzan a derrochar su dinero.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.desc: A protective mother tries to hide her daughter deputies - and consequences; police search for the key to a mysterious glove compartment; a rideshare driver gets pulled over when her passenger raises deputies' suspicions.

programme.title: Red in the Face
programme.desc: Emotions run high after a mom with a warrant fails to elude deputies; police pull over a habitual traffic offender after they spot him behind the wheel; cops roll up to a reported fight and find evidence of a bloody argument.

programme.title: Out of Breath
programme.desc: A wanted burglary suspect exhausts himself after jumping too many fences. Officers engage in a tense standoff with a felon who won't come out of his grandma's house. Things go south for a man with a questionable-looking moped.

programme.title: Front Seat Fumble
programme.desc: A convenience store confrontation turns into a parking lot skirmish. An uncoordinated car passenger attracts deputies' attention. A suspicious man swears he peeked into a closed store because he wanted to read their menu.

programme.title: Salt and Dash
programme.desc: Nerves get the better of one woman when she tries to elude a deputy on a bike; deputies come to a decision after two animated exes tell their sides of the story; a man's choice in seasonings raises a red flag for police.

programme.title: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: An unlucky family gets a rude awakening when a drunk driver crashes out in their driveway; a suspended license doesn't stop a man from driving his dad home; a car full of teens gets pulled over on their way to a movie.

programme.title: Brush With Trouble
programme.desc: Vehicles peel out of a parking lot when officers arrive to break up a street race; a goofy driver tries to crack jokes to lessen the seriousness of his mistake; a wanted woman cares more about her oral hygiene than her warrant.

programme.title: Instant Regret
programme.desc: An apologetic motorcyclist is lucky to be alive after crashing out on a dark road; deputies question two passengers during a traffic stop; a young driver admits his situation doesn't look good when police pull him over.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A woman's birthday ends with a foot pursuit; deputies are skeptical when a suspect claims he was given a freebie; Grandma comes to the rescue when a scared teen gets pulled over without a license.

programme.title: Capítulo 141
programme.desc: Teo tells Miguel and Nico that the room guard of the Lodge has a black eye; they look for suspects. Celina becomes depressed because of her break up with Augusto; she binge eats. Roberta and Pepa go to Puebla City. León finds out Diego left school.

programme.title: Capítulo 142
programme.desc: León reveals to Mabel that Paola is a prostitute. Giovanni lies to Raquel about his family, saying they're royalty. José tries to help Celina with the PE test. Mia forgets to do her math homework; Gastón brings it to class completed. Renata makes the students participate in a math competition. Celina gets injured during the test. Mia angers Gastón when she goes to Madariaga for help. León finds Diego with Roberta at the hotel.

programme.title: Capítulo 143
programme.desc: Pilar tries to get Lupita and Tomás together for hidden reasons. Paola rejects Diego after seeing León. Miguel, Nico, and Teo plan to follow Tomás and Giovanni to see which is in the Lodge. Giovanni hires a man to pose as his rich father. León tells Diego that Paola is a whore. Nico and Miguel get ambushed by the suspect. Celina is comforted by Miguel on the subject of image.

programme.title: Capítulo 144
programme.desc: Gastón invites Mia out on a date. Giovanni's fake parents aren't what they seem. Vico follows Celina to find out her secret appointment. Carlo tells Roberta he has a surprise for her. Franco and Valeria come to see if Mia lied about staying at school so she could go out with Gastón.

programme.title: Capítulo 145
programme.desc: Carlo and Roberta go drag racing. Giovanni tries to ride a horse. Vico realizes the place Celina visited. Nico tries to ruin Lupita's date. León has Diego fight his anger out. Raquel finds out Giovanni lied. Diego give Nico his guitar; Nico sees the matching shoes in Diego, Tomás, Giovanni's room. Roberta and Carlo are arrested; revealing Mia's lie.

programme.title: Capítulo 146
programme.desc: Franco finds out Mia isn't with Carlo and Roberta. Paola begs for Diego's forgiveness, which he gives, but refuses to take her back. Mia and Gastón go out on a date. Vico calls Celina's mom to stop her from making a life change. Carlo and Robert go search for Mia. Celina's mom sets her up on a date; however, the date proves to be beneficial to Celina. Roberta ruins Simon's date by saying she's pregnant and underage.

programme.title: Capítulo 147
programme.desc: Nico breaks up with Karen. Gastón tells Mia he wants to speak to her dad. Teo receives a gift. Simon plans to get Roberta back for flattening his tires. Paola lies to Roberta that her and Diego are back together to get revenge. Miguel tells Teo he will take his place at the Lodge initiation.

programme.title: Capítulo 148
programme.desc: León gives Diego a brand new car; Roberta crashes it. Gastón confronts Mia about her lingering feelings for Miguel. The Lodge figures out Miguel took Teo place; the later kidnap and torture Teo. Miguel and Mia kiss. Nico is told by Karen's father that the band is no longer welcome at his club. Giovanni, Diego, and Tomás put Madariaga's picture on an online dating site.

programme.title: Capítulo 149
programme.desc: Nico is upset about Karen's father, Jacobo's, decision about the band. Gastón orders Mia to call her father so they can talk. Teo is tied up by the Lodge and tortured. Diego finds out it was Roberta who crashed his car. Viviana misleads Franco to get Mia in trouble. The other band members try to convince Diego to come back to the band; without him they can't perform at the club. José's tutor comes to take her out but also to tell her to get close to Gastón. Gastón follows Mia and sees the band.

programme.title: Capítulo 150
programme.desc: The band finds out Gastón saw them perform; Miguel blames Mia, the others agree. Giovanni tries to rescue Teo but they are both caught and tortured. Nico tells his mother that he is in love with Lupita, not Karen. It's revealed that Pilar is in the Lodge. Viviana threatens Mia that she will tell Franco; later writes a fake fan letter even after Miguel asked her not to. Nico's mom tells Lupita to break up with Nico if she loves him.

programme.title: Nuevo objetivo
programme.desc: Arriaga desenmascara a Odette. Niki cree q Guzmán defendió a su amante. Tomasina lleva el cheque al papá de Guzmán. Kendra visita a Niki para ir a visitar un diseñador. Tiene un plan para secuestrar a Niki.

programme.title: Nikki secuestrada
programme.desc: Descubren q Niki y Kendra Han sido secuestradas. Salcero quiere dirigir la negociación del secuestro. Piden dinero para dejarla libre. Beatrix quiere trabajar y Cristina ofrece ayuda con Guillo.

programme.title: Culpable del secuestro
programme.desc: Salcero está en contacto con espanto manejando el secuestro. Kendra y salcero conversan q harán con el rescate. Cristina y Aníbal se conocen. Salcero culpa a Guzmán del secuestro.

programme.title: Rescate
programme.desc: Niki atenta escape pero por salvar a Kendra se rinde. Kendra da instrucciones a Espanto de cómo repartirán el botín. Guzmán consigue la dirección de los secuestradores. El y Arriaga van al rescate.

programme.title: Traición y venganza
programme.desc: Salcero previene a Espanto y escapan. Jonas propone a espanto quedarse con el dinero. Arriaga y Guzmán acompañan a Victoria a entregar el rescate.

programme.title: Primer beso
programme.desc: Recuperan a Niki. Kendra feliz se cree rica. Jonás y Espanto traicionan a Kendra. Nelson se va a ver a Kendra. Ella logra q se quede a pasar la noche. Arriaga besa a Victoria mientras ella duerme.

programme.title: Season 1
programme.desc: The pilot outline for "Amores Verdaderos" "Amores Verdaderos pilot introduces Victoria, a successful woman engaged to Armando. She meets José Ángel, a humble gardener, leading to unexpected connections and family conflicts."

programme.title: Enfermedad al descubierto
programme.desc: Guzmán descubre q Niki tiene una enfermedad. Niki se entera q Lili trabaja en su casa de jardinera. Aníbal se entera del secuestro. Arriaga lleva a Victoria a la casa del lago para descansar con Nelson.

programme.desc: The pilot outline for "Amores Verdaderos" "Amores Verdaderos pilot introduces Victoria, a successful woman engaged to Armando. She meets José Ángel, a humble gardener, leading to unexpected connections and family conflicts."
